sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_reinterpret (value Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
SELECT value, reinterpretAsInt128(value) AS reinterpret_value FROM test_reinterpret;
UPDATE test_reinterpret SET value = reinterpretAsInt128(4096) WHERE value = 1024;
SELECT reinterpretAsInt128(toUInt32(value)) AS reinterpret_uint FROM test_reinterpret;
